Talvez uma das etapas isoladas esteja servido como um metodo de filtragem temporal ou ele mesmo aplique um.

Anotation: Fala do uso do "iterative spatio-spectral patterns learning (ISSPL) that employs statistical learning theory to perform automatic learning of spatio-spectral filters". Por ter uma parte espectral, provavel que tenha um filtro temporal nele, ou alguma etapa relacionada

Autores: Li F.; He F.; Wang F.; Zhang D.; Xia Y.; Li X.
Titulo: A novel simplified convolutional neural network classification algorithm of motor imagery EEG signals based on deep learning
Anotation: O Artigo fala "In this paper, we propose an algorithm that combines continuous wavelet transform (CWT) and a simplified convolutional neural network (SCNN) to improve the recognition rate of MI-EEG signals. Using the CWT, the MI-EEG signals are mapped to time-frequency image signals". Portanto tem chance de poder considerar a existencia de um filtro temporal no CWT.

Autores: Lemm S.; Schäfer C.; Curio G.
Titulo: BCI Competition 2003 - Data set III: Modeling of sensorimotor μ rhythms for classification of imaginary hand movements
Anotation: O Artigo fala " filtering EEG wideband raw data with causal Morlet wavelets, which are adapted to individual EEG spectra. Since imaginary hand movements lead to perturbations of the ongoing pericentral μ rhythm, we estimate probabilistic models for amplitude modulation in lower (10 Hz) and upper (20 Hz) frequency bands over the sensorimotor hand cortices both contra- and ipsilaterally to the imagined movements (i.e., at EEG channels C3 and C4)". Parece então usar Wavelets como um possivel filtro temporal.

Autores: Zhao L.; Sun Y.; Ma Y.; Guo X.; He Y.; Gao X.
Titulo: Research of brain-computer interface system based on motor imagery

Autores: Feng Z.; Qian L.; Hu H.; Sun Y.

Autores: Luo T.; Zhou C.
Titulo: Overlapped Features Strategy and Parameters Optimization Patterns Recognition for Motor Imagery EEG; [重叠特征策略与参数优化的运动想象脑电模式识别]
Anotation: Ta em chines

Autores: Herman P.; Prasad G.; McGinnity T.M.; Coyle D.
Titulo: Comparative analysis of spectral approaches to feature extraction for EEG-based motor imagery classification
Anotation: O artigo fala "objective of the paper is to perform comparative analysis of different approaches to spectral signal representation such as power spectral density (PSD) techniques, atomic decompositions, time-frequency (t-f) energy distributions, continuous and discrete wavelet approaches, from which band power features can be extracted and used in the framework of MI classification". Portanto parece ter filtro temporal.

Autores: Daly I.; Billinger M.; Scherer R.; Müller-Putz G.

Autores: Zhuan Z.; Bian Y.; He X.; Yuan P.; Geng L.; Li J.; Sun M.

Anotation: O artigo fala "acquiring MI and mVEP potentials and electroencephalogram (EEG) signal preprocessing, the filter bank common spatial pattern (FBCSP) algorithm was used to extract MI and mVEP features", logo é possivel perceber que tem filtro temporal por conta do FBCSP.

Autores: Zhou Q.; Ye X.; Li S.; Du Q.; Ke L.
Titulo: CD3Net: A Contrastive Diffusion Model with Domain Adaptive Data Synthetic Network for Motor Imagery and Emotion classification
Anotation: O artigo fala "To adaptively reduce noise, this paper proposes the Contrastive Diffusion Model with Domain Adaptive Data Synthetic Network(CD3Net), a contrastive diffusion model for synthesizing domain adaptation EEG data. Firstly, we separated the clean module and the noise module in the reverse process of diffusion to achieve denoising, then obtained the synthesized data". Isso me parece ter o uso de uma estrategia para filtragem temporal (denoise). Não fica claro se é para o paradigma MI, mas parece ser por conta das keywords.

Autores: Higashi H.; Tanaka T.
Titulo: Simultaneous design of FIR filter banks and spatial patterns for EEG signal classification
Anotation: o artigo fala "To achieve accurate classification in CSP, it is necessary to find frequency bands that relate to brain activities associated with BCI tasks" e complementa dizendo "we propose discriminative filter bank CSP (DFBCSP) that designs finite impulse response filters and the associated spatial weights by optimizing an objective function which is a natural extension of that of CSP". Eu diria que provavelmente vai ter filtro temporal, mas não ta claro se é problema de classificação.

Autores: Qin L.; Ding L.; He B.
Titulo: Motor imagery classification by means of source analysis for brain-computer interface applications
Anotation: Artigo faz um estudo sobre classificação de MI usando o resultado do problema inverso para dizer se foi ou não realisado o movimento. Foi usado o ICA como filtro espaço temporal. Muito tem que ser verificado para enteder melhor o que foi feito e se cabe dentro da SLR

Autores: Hsu W.-Y.
Titulo: Motor imagery EEG discrimination using the correlation of wavelet features
Anotation: O artigo fala " Time-frequency representation is constructed by means of continuous wavelet transform from EEG signals and then weighted with 2-sample t-statistics, which are also used to automatically select the area of interest in advance". Parece que foi usado o wavelet como filtro temporal

Autores: Firat Ince N.; Arica S.; Tewfik A.
Titulo: Classification of single trial motor imagery EEG recordings with subject adapted non-dyadic arbitrary time-frequency tilings
Anotation: O artigo fala "EEG data obtained from the C3/C 4 electrode locations of the standard 10/20 system is adaptively segmented in time, over a non-dyadic grid by maximizing the probabilistic distances between expansion coefficients corresponding to left and right hand movement imagery. This is followed by a frequency domain clustering procedure in each adapted time segment to maximize the discrimination power of the resulting time-frequency features", o que mostra que deve ter de forma mais clara no artigo uma forma de filtragem temporal.

Autores: Schlögl A.; Lee F.; Bischof H.; Pfurtscheller G.
Titulo: Characterization of four-class motor imagery EEG data for the BCI-competition 2005
Anotation: Pode ser que o Kalman filter falado no artigo aparece como um filtro temporal, mas é melhor ler para ter certeza.

Autores: Eltokhy M.A.R.; Idris S.; Gouda M.M.; Hamad H.; Hosny T.; El-Rifaie A.M.
Titulo: Electroencephalogram Feature Extraction and Classification of Motor Imagery EEG Based on Machine Learning Algorithms
Anotation: O artigo fala "The signals were sampled at 200 Hz and preprocessed with notch filtering (8–40 Hz) to remove noise and artifacts. Features were extracted from both the frequency and time-frequency domains—including power spectral density and wavelet coefficients—to capture discriminative neural patterns associated with motor imagery", logo é claro que tem filtro temporal ao menos no notch filter.

Autores: Lu N.; Li T.; Ren X.; Miao H.
Titulo: A Deep Learning Scheme for Motor Imagery Classification based on Restricted Boltzmann Machines
Anotation: O artigo fala " Specifically, frequency domain representations of EEG signals obtained via fast Fourier transform (FFT) and wavelet package decomposition (WPD) are obtained to train three RBMs". Pode ser que o FFT ou WPD são usados como filtro temporal.

Autores: Chandrakant N.
Titulo: Administrating MANETs via brain computer interface
Anotation: O artigo fala "The algorithms of Digital signal processing and pattern recognition certainly constitute necessary components of a BCI system which are applied to the EEG signals to decode mental states those are relevant for BCI operation" mas complementa apenas depois com "The processed data has been applied on to nodes of MANET where each set of sensor nodes are used for particular application". Acretido que esse artigo pode ser cortado fora, mas vale a pena ver para ter certeza.

Autores: Aydemir O.; Kayikcioglu T.
Titulo: Wavelet transform based classification of invasive brain computer interface data
Anotation: É de ECoG e não EEG.

Autores: Avilés-Cruz C.; Villegas-Cortez J.; Ferreyra-Ramírez A.; Zúnuñiga López A.
Titulo: EEG pattern recognition: An efficient improvement combination of ERD/ERS/Laterality features to create a self-paced BCI system
Anotation: artigo fala que "Our proposal uses delta, theta, alfa and beta rhythms to BCI system. From the spectral power, an efficient combination of ERD/ERS/laterality features was used. Because electroencephalogram signals are non-stationary type and highly vary over time and frequency, a detailed time-frequency analysis is applied. Features coming from timefrequency analysis, where eight frequency bands ranging from 0 to 32 Hz were chosen". Portanto, pode se dizer que usa filtro temporal dentro dessa abordagem, mas não fala claramente que usa.

Autores: Duan L.; Hongxin Z.; Khan M.S.; Fang M.
Titulo: Recognition of motor imagery tasks for BCI using CSP and chaotic PSO twin SVM
Anotation: Artigo usa "a common spatial pattern (CSP) and chaotic particle swarm optimization (CPSO) twin support vector machine (TWSVM) scheme". Não parece ter filtro temporal mas é bom olhar para confirmar.

Autores: Zou L.; Wang X.; Shi G.; Ma Z.
Titulo: EEG feature extraction and pattern classification based on motor imagery in brain-computer interface

Autores: Liu C.; Wang H.; Pu H.; Zhang Y.; Zou L.
Titulo: EEG feature extraction and pattern recognition during right and left hands motor imagery in brain-computer interface

The reconstructed signal of approximation coefficient A6 on the sixth level is selected to build up a feature signal". Portanto parece usar DWT para fazer a filtragem temporal, mas é bom verificar.

Autores: López-Montes C.; Cárdenas-Peña D.; Castellanos-Dominguez G.
Titulo: Supervised Relevance Analysis for Multiple Stein Kernels for Spatio-Spectral Component Selection in BCI Discrimination Tasks

Parece que usa um metodo de filtragem temporal, vale a pena verificar se o MSK funciona como tal ou se tem outro.

Autores: Tsui C.S.L.; Gan J.Q.; Roberts S.J.
Titulo: A self-paced brain - Computer interface for controlling a robot simulator: An online event labelling paradigm and an extended Kalman filter based algorithm for online training
Anotation: não fala nada com muita clareza, verificar se pode cortar.

Autores: Muthong S.; Vateekul P.; Sriyudthsak M.
Titulo: An adjustment strategy on multi-session EEG data for online left/right hand imagery classification
Anotation: Aparenta de forma indireta apresentar filtros temporais como mostra em "In our system, the features are extracted by applying the wavelet transformation, and Neural Network is chosen as our classifier. The experiment was conducted on the BCI IV data set and compared to four existing techniques: (i) non-normalized wavelet, (ii) Z-transform, (iii) CSP, and (iv) CSP with Morlet wavelet, in terms of accuracy". Entretanto pode ser que o passo a passo em "subtracting "estimated mean" and dividing "estimated interquartile rage" (IQR) or "estimated standard deviation" (SD), which are obtaining by using exponentially weighted moving average (EWMA)", pode servir como um "filtro temporal".

Autores: Li B.; Yang B.; Guan C.; Hu C.
